description: Public-safe dogfood execution checklist for moving 6529bot from reviewed source to command-only and limited initial-review traffic on trusted repositories.

phases.title: Baseline
phases.objective: Start from reviewed source, a selected trusted repository, and public-safe readiness evidence before any live model calls.

items.title: Bot source commit or tag is reviewed, merged, and recorded in private operator evidence.
items.evidence: git rev-parse HEAD plus release PR or tag decision

items.title: Dogfood target repository is selected, trusted, and scoped for the GitHub App installation.
items.evidence: selected-repository summary without private repo details

items.title: Command-only repository config is reviewed before merge to the target repository base branch.
items.evidence: validated .github/6529bot.yml summary from the target repo base branch

items.title: Dogfood readiness check passes for reviewed target config, budget policy, model catalog, and optional strict preflight.
items.evidence: npm run dogfood:readiness output summary

phases.title: Noop Path
phases.objective: Verify GitHub delivery, admission, budget, and fanout behavior without queueing worker jobs.

items.title: Production GitHub App is installed only on selected trusted dogfood repositories.
items.evidence: installation scope summary without installation ids or private repo details

items.title: Central App server is running with REVIEWBOT_WORKER_ADAPTER=noop.
items.evidence: health check and runtime config summary

items.title: GitHub App ping delivery succeeds and invalid signatures fail closed.
items.evidence: public-safe webhook acceptance summary

items.title: Saved pull_request delivery replays in dry-run mode with expected config, admission, budget, and fanout decisions.
items.evidence: webhook replay summary without raw payloads

items.title: Untrusted public-repo actor cannot create model-spend jobs.
items.evidence: admission denial summary with actor category only

phases.title: Command-Only Review
phases.objective: Run the first live review only from a trusted maintainer comment with conservative budgets and visible rollback.

items.title: Worker path is enabled with conservative capacity, run-control caps, and a single provider/model lane.
items.evidence: worker adapter, capacity, run-control, and lane summary

items.title: Trusted maintainer triggers exactly one command-only review on a small PR.
items.evidence: comment-command summary such as /6529bot general, without raw diff or prompt text

items.title: 6529bot posts a bounded PR comment with expected review kind, model attribution, and no private data.
items.evidence: public PR comment link or public-safe summary

items.title: Usage, job lifecycle, budget, and run-control evidence are written for the command-only run.
items.evidence: aggregate ledger counts and status summaries, not raw prompts, diffs, or private scope values

items.title: Budget status and scheduled alert posture are visible to private operators after the first live command.
items.evidence: admin budget/status and alert/status summary without delivery secrets

phases.title: Limited Initial Review
phases.objective: Enable a narrow automatic review only after command-only evidence is healthy.

items.title: Limited initial-review repository config is reviewed and merged after command-only success.
items.evidence: validated config summary showing initial review kinds and max jobs

items.title: A small trusted PR receives only the intended initial review jobs.
items.evidence: review-kind and lane summary without raw prompt or diff text

items.title: A follow-up commit triggers the followup review path and consults prior bot comments.
items.evidence: followup run summary and public-safe comment link

items.title: Draft PR, oversized diff, and disabled-review skip paths behave as expected.
items.evidence: skip reason summaries without raw payloads

phases.title: Visibility And Rollback
phases.objective: Confirm operators can observe spend and stop traffic quickly before expanding dogfood.

items.title: Public usage summary exposes only allowlisted public aggregate data.
items.evidence: public summary counts and disclosure posture

items.title: Private admin snapshot is reviewed after command-only and limited-initial runs.
items.evidence: npm run admin:snapshot summary without raw rows or scope values

items.title: Spend and job-health alerts dry-run and deliver to an operator-owned private channel.
items.evidence: alert evaluation and delivery summary without webhook URLs, ARNs, or addresses

items.title: Operators verify at least one no-spend rollback path before expanding dogfood.
items.evidence: rollback exercise summary using noop, repo disable, budget cap, App uninstall, or provider-key disablement

items.title: Dogfood decision is recorded as expand, continue command-only, defer, or block.
items.evidence: decision summary in private operator evidence and public-safe release notes
